nasb.text: Then Saul said to Ahijah, “Bring the ark of God here.” For the ark of God was at that time with the sons of Israel.

esv.text: So Saul said to Ahijah, “Bring the ark of God here.” For the ark of God went at that time with the people of Israel.

cnv.text: 掃羅對亞希亞說：“把　神的約櫃運來！”因為那時　神的約櫃在以色列人那裡。

ccb.text: 扫罗对亚希亚说：“把上帝的约柜抬来。”那时上帝的约柜在以色列人那里。
